ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar May-15-2023 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Apr-17-2023 Continued To May-15-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Mar-28-2023 Off Calendar

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Dec-20-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Joan C. Rodman, via Zoom, in propria persona, Petitioner.

At the query of the court, Petitioner reports that she failed to appear at the previous calling due to a software issue which caused a calendaring error. Petitioner reports as to the status of the Estate and that a Status Petition was just recently filed and has a hearing date of Mar-28-2023 and that the Estate is ready to close and thus intends to file a Petition for Final Distribution.

After additional discussion, the Order to Appear and Order to Show Cause are discharged and taken off calendar. The remaining subject matter is taken under submission.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Choi. Not Reported.

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Dec-20-2022 Off Calendar

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Nov-22-2022 Continued To Dec-20-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person. The court declares that several Examiner's notes have yet to be addressed. An Order to Appear will be issued to in propria persona Personal Representative Joan C. Rodman to appear on Dec-2022 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why she failed to appear and why the Examiner's Notes have not been addressed. An Order to Show Cause shall be issued as to why the court should not impose sanctions of up to $250 on the Personal Representative for failure to appear and is returnable on Dec-20-2022. The status hearing is also continued to that date. Responses to the Order to Show Cause are to be filed by Dec-13-2022 and a courtesy copy delivered to the court by noon on Dec-14-2022.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Cristobal. Not Reported.

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Oct-25-2022 Continued To Nov-22-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Oct-04-2022 Continued To Oct-25-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Sep-26-2022 Off Calendar

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Jul-18-2022 Text Ruling

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jul-18-2022 Continued To Sep-26-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Joan C. Rodman, via Zoom, in propria persona, Executor.

Ms. Rodman offers testimony regarding the delay in submitting a petition in this matter and advises that offers for the purchase of the real property are currently being taken. The court acknowledges Ms. Rodman's update but advises that she needs to file either a Petition for Final Distribution or a Petition to Approve Report of Status of Administration prior to the next calling of this matter.

The Order to Appear is taken off calendar. The Status on Close of Estate is continued to Sep-26-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Glisson. Not Reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jun-06-2022 Continued To Jul-18-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person. An Order to Appear will be issued to Petitioner in propria persona Joan Rodman to appear on Jul-18-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204 to explain why they failed to appear and why a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration has not been filed. The status hearing is also continued to that date.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Bastain. Not Reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar May-09-2022 Continued To Jun-06-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Feb-10-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

This matter was put on for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. The Court noted that notice is proper. No one appeared to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated September 30, 2018 is admitted to probate. Joan Rodman is appointed as the Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for May 9, 2022 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is filed one week prior, the status hearing will be taken off calendar. If a petition is not filed by then, Ms. Rodman will be required to appear and explain why a petition has not been filed.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.
